title: Claim Ledger - Single Source of Truth
description: Track all statistics and claims used in pitches to prevent hallucination

schema.claim: string - The exact statistic or claim text
schema.source: string - Source of the claim (e.g., NHTSA, CDC, internal study)
schema.verified: boolean - Whether claim has been verified
schema.verificationMethod: string - How it was verified (manual, automated, cross-reference)
schema.context: string - How claim should be used in pitch
schema.contraIndications: array - Things to avoid when using this claim

riskThresholds.medium: verified: true OR has source (but not both)
riskThresholds.high: verified: false, no source, or new claim not in ledger
